title: Website & Ecommerce Development in a Day | WE Digital Studio
description: Enterprise-level websites: strategy, design and development, all in one day. Planned in the morning, live by sunset.

hero.subhead: Enterprise level websites. Strategy, Design & Development, all in one day.

caseStudy.quote: Working with WE has been a great experience.  WE rebuilt & optimized our store, as well as managed our ads. Conversion rate went gone up and sales grew consistently.

projects.title: California Chicken Cafe
projects.caseBody:
**A custom Webflow experience built for convenience.** We created a polished site that makes finding a location, viewing the menu, and ordering delivery effortless.

**What we did:** Custom Webflow design and development; interactive menu and location map; delivery-partner links; a flexible CMS their team can easily update.

projects.title: Ovando
projects.caseBody:
**A defining name in New York floral design.** Ovando trusts WE to translate her distinctive creative vision into an equally refined digital presence.

**What we do:** Ongoing site development and management; digital strategy; seasonal storytelling; a polished online experience built to captivate and grow.

projects.title: Stoned Immaculate Clothing
projects.caseBody:
**3× revenue in six months.** WE rebuilt Stoned Immaculate's Shopify store from the ground up and implemented a structured ad-testing and scaling framework across paid social and search.

**What we did:** Shopify theme and PDP rebuild; creative testing on Meta and Google; a scaling framework driven by blended ROAS.

projects.title: 11 Honoré
projects.caseBody:
**From idea to exit.**

Two full site builds, launch and growth marketing, and ongoing optimization, all the way through to acquisition.

projects.title: Grow Organic Baby
projects.caseBody:
**2× business growth in a highly competitive market.** Our ecommerce and marketing work helped Grow Organic Baby double its business and reach more families.

**What we did:** Shopify development; conversion optimization; digital growth strategy; ongoing marketing and site management.

cards.title: Built for speed
cards.body: Lightning page loads and clean code.

cards.title: AI & Search Discovery
cards.body: Metadata and accessibility baked in, so your brand is discovered no matter where users search.

cards.title: Secure & scalable
cards.body: Rock-solid infrastructure that scales grows with you, and code you fully own and control.

process.heading: Three steps from brief to live.

steps.title: Plan
steps.body: Help us understand your goals, audience. Here is where we align on scope and direction. Your vision laid out, we just help refine it.

steps.title: Design
steps.body: Once we lock in content, structure and stylistic inspirations. We present you 3 fully rendered designs of your homepage.

steps.title: Launch & Refine
steps.body: Your site is delivered the same day. Most teams need another day or two to review & request refinements and we are happy to oblige.

cta.heading: Tell us your vision. We'll build it tomorrow.
cta.body: Start with our questionnaire. It takes about 2 minutes and starts your process.

contact.heading: See what WE can do for your brand.
contact.body: Great work begins with a great fit. Let's talk about your brand, where you're headed, and how we can help you get there.
